title: Adversa AI Red Teaming platform
description: Adversa AI—s Red Teaming platform automates security testing across classic, generative, and Agentic AI, uncovering adversarial examples, jailbreaks, prompt injections, MCP flaws, and agent_specific vulnerabilities in memory, tools, and inter_agent communication for comprehensive, robust protection.

items: Available Agent Scanning, Agent Penetration Testing, Adversarial red-teaming: goal drift, prompt injection, hallucination chaining, & over-permissioned tool usage.
Validate agent decisions against expected goal plans.
